phase: REELFORGE PHASE 69.5 — HERO MEDIA DOMAIN SEPARATION

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Uploaded entry was always prepended into personalVideos and persisted to personal_video_vault without a hero-domain gate.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: AI_CLEANUP_AGENT.distributeVideoToFeed(entry) was always invoked after vault write.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Feed insertion allowed downstream placeholder/feed processors to treat Hero video as standard content.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: All entries were written directly to personal_video_vault with no hero exclusion.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Video vault hydration later re-distributed persisted rows into feed.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Cross-domain feed hydration indirectly exposed Hero rows to placeholder maintenance flow.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Stored personal_video_vault rows were replayed to personalVideos without filtering Hero signatures.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Recovered personalVideos could be propagated by AI cleanup sync routines.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Thumbnail-side replay could propagate cross-domain metadata into placeholder regeneration.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Merged backend + local video entries could include Hero media before being set/persisted.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Offline branch distributed every personal video to feed (including Hero-shaped rows).
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Feed rebuild path and thumbnail sync execution could retain contaminated records.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Not a vault writer, but consumed contaminated video rows from personal_video_vault.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: No hero-domain check before createLocalReel + unshift to feed category.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Once in feed, Hero media became eligible for generic content orchestration and placeholder coexistence.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Read all rows from personal_video_vault including Hero-like rows.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Looped through every row and called distributeVideoToFeed without Hero filtering.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Feed contamination enabled mixed-domain placeholder reconciliation against polluted content sets.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: Not a direct vault writer; consumed thumbnail vault entries for feed placeholders.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Constructed personal thumbnail placeholders for all thumbnail rows without Hero guard.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: This is the primary placeholder insertion path and accepted all rows pre-fix.

paths.reasonAssetEntersVault: API reel hydration could write Hero-like rows into personal_video_vault/personal_thumbnails unless explicitly filtered.
paths.reasonAssetEntersFeed: Hydrated vault rows were later synchronized by AI cleanup into feed.
paths.reasonAssetEntersPlaceholderSystem: Hydrated thumbnail rows fed placeholder rebuild loops.
Not a placeholder writer; however Hero-shaped candidate rows could still be indexed without explicit Hero guard.
